description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a complex, multi-sectioned structure and a fenced backyard. The house features a prominent front porch with columns, a central gabled section, and several attached wings, including a garage. The roof is primarily gabled with multiple intersecting ridges and dormers, and the exterior is adorned with numerous windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a backyard with patio furniture, and mature trees providing shade. The fenced yard encloses a play area and additional outbuildings, suggesting a family-oriented suburban setting. The overall design blends traditional and colonial architectural elements, with a focus on spaciousness and outdoor living.
description: A large, two-story colonial-style house with a gabled roof, front porch, garage, and a fenced backyard featuring trees and patio furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch with columns, driveway, and garage; the house facade is symmetrical with a central gable.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage doors, driveway, and a clear view of the backyard with patio furniture and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area with lounge chairs, and the back of the house with multiple windows and a small outbuilding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, trees, and the side elevation of the house with additional windows and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical placement on side and rear elevations
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps leading up, and a central door flanked by windows.
